options.name: --config
options.description: Use config file from a custom path for this process.

options.name: --set
options.description: Override config values for this process only.

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run one action by name and optional colon-style args

options.name: --defaults
options.description: Show bundled default config instead of active config

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Get one config value by key

subcommands.name: path
subcommands.description: Print path of the active config file
